hero.title: Stop Losing Patients. Bring Order to Your Clinic.
hero.subtitle: Smart digital reception on WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook—connected to Optima: instant replies, booking, reminders, waiting list, and follow-up—tailored to your clinic.
advantages.title: What Your Clinic Gains
advantages.subtitle: Operational order and no lead left behind—on every channel your patients use
advantages.card1.title: Instant Response to Every Inquiry
advantages.card1.desc: On WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook—no lead goes unanswered, even after hours
advantages.card2.title: Fewer No-Shows
advantages.card2.desc: Automatic reminders and AI rescheduling when needed—more patients show up
advantages.card3.title: 24/7 Digital Reception
advantages.card3.desc: AI assistant on WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook—always on without overloading staff
advantages.card4.title: Connected to Optima
advantages.card4.desc: Appointments, patient data, and automations sync to the CRM you already use—no double entry
advantages.card5.title: Multilingual
advantages.card5.desc: Hebrew, English, and Russian—and more languages to match your patient base
advantages.card6.title: Alert When a Human Is Needed
advantages.card6.desc: Routine handled automatically; your team is notified only for sensitive or complex cases
advantages.getAccess: Get platform access and start filling schedule gaps and communication gaps
advantages.clinicsUsing: Built for dental clinics that run on Optima
value.title: Real Value for Clinic Owners
value.card1.title: Fewer Lost Leads, More Appointments
value.card1.desc: Every inquiry from WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook gets an instant reply and lands in Optima—more conversations become booked visits.
value.card2.title: A Fuller Schedule
value.card2.desc: Reminders, rescheduling, waiting list, and outreach to inactive patients—fill open slots and reduce cancellations.
value.card3.title: Operational Order
value.card3.desc: One thread per patient, organized invites, and smart staff alerts—less chaos at the front desk and on the phone.
value.card4.title: Professional Service Without the Load
value.card4.desc: Automatic follow-up, tips, and consistent messaging—your team focuses on the chair, not chasing messages.
waitingList.title: A Waiting List That Works for You
waitingList.subtitle: Last-minute cancellation? The system notifies the next patient on WhatsApp (and other channels as needed), books the slot, and updates Optima—no spreadsheets or phone tag.
waitingList.bullet1: Automatic notification to the next patient when a slot opens
waitingList.bullet2: An organized queue instead of manual front-desk chaos
waitingList.bullet3: Full visibility in Optima—who is waiting, confirmed, and when
integrations.title: All Inquiries in One Place — WhatsApp, Instagram & Facebook to Optima
integrations.subtitle: One AI assistant answers, books, and follows up on every channel. Calendar and patient data stay in Optima—no double entry.
integrations.channel.whatsapp: WhatsApp — the main channel for most clinics
integrations.channel.instagram: Instagram — DMs and inquiries → same booking flow
integrations.channel.facebook: Facebook — Messenger and page messages → same flow
integrations.optima: Full Optima sync: appointments, patient records, and automations
integrations.extras: Outreach to inactive patient lists, custom automations, and personalization to your clinic name and services
cta.title: Ready for Order in Your Clinic and Leads That Don't Slip Away?
cta.subtitle: Instant response on WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook, Optima booking, and a smart waiting list—all automated
footer.description: Felix Labs: digital reception on WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook, connected to Optima—so you never miss an opportunity.
